song.title: Jesus Only is Our Message
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus only is our message, Jesus all our theme shall be; We will up lift up Jesus ever, Jesus only will we see.
[C] Chorus Jesus only, Jesus ever, Jesus all in all we sing, Savior, Sanctifier, and Healer, Glorious Lord and coming King.
[V2] 2) Jesus only is our Savior, All our guilt He bore away, All our righteousness He gives us, All our strength from day to day.
[V3] 3) Jesus is our Sanctifier, Saving us from self and sin, And with all His Spirit’s fulness, Filling all our hearts within.
[V4] 4) Jesus only is our Healer, All our sicknesses He bare, And His risen life and fulness, All His members still may share.
[V5] 5) Jesus only is our Power, He the gift of Pentecost; Jesus, breathe Thy pow’r upon us, Fill us with the Holy Ghost.
[V6] 6) And for Jesus we are waiting, List’ning for the Advent Call; But ’twill still be Jesus only, Jesus ever, all in all.
song.author: Albert B. Simpson
